lines: France absolutely steamrolled Morocco 2–0 in the quarter-final last night, which means Callum is up there cackling at the top of the table on 87pts with TWO teams still alive, while Butters watched his last remaining hope — Morocco — get absolutely fucked into the bin, leaving him clinging to Norway like a drowning rat on a lilo.

Special mention to Wilmot, sitting 3rd on 75pts, who had the absolute brass balls to draft BOTH England AND Morocco AND Norway, and has now watched Morocco get twatted out by France — so congratulations you lucky useless prick, you're down to two teams and one of them is England, which historically is like backing a greyhound with three legs and a drinking problem.

The Foreman deserves a specific roasting today — 8th on 56pts, with France as his ONLY surviving team, meaning he is entirely dependent on a nation he shares with Callum, Croft, and Dene, four cunts fighting over the same horse like it's the last kebab at 2am.

Today's quarter-final is Spain vs Belgium, and Jim — sitting 6th on 59pts with Spain as his SOLE surviving team after Morocco and Sweden got binned — is one dodgy goalkeeper away from having literally nothing left in this sweepstake, which would be absolutely fucking hilarious.

Watch Spain vs Belgium today — if Belgium pull off the upset, Jim is a dead man walking on 59pts with fuck all to show for it, and frankly that outcome would make this the best World Cup in living memory.
